channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flyposted lamppost on peckham hill street, 26th March
item.description:
Please remove the illegal flyposting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Planks of wood flytipped, 26th March
item.description:
Please remove soon

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utility unit graffitied at the end of marmont road, 26th March
item.description:
Please clean off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress in commonwealth graveyard, 26th March
item.description:
I was visiting the cemetery in Star Lane, St Mary Cray a few days back and thought i would tell you that there is rubbish dumped to the right-hand area beyond the little church like building and towards the right side back. It is where my relatives are buried. I am now 68 and i thought this looked terrible. Is it possible some kind council staff could clear it up ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped pallet, 26th March
item.description:
Wooden pallet dumped from a van

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess on pavement outside 2 eynella, 26th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynella Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kerbstone is sticking up outside 61 Morley Hill, EN2 0BL, 26th March
item.description:
Kerbstone is a trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Red Lion Pub at the junction of Red Lion Street and High Holborn, 26th March
item.description:
Tree blocking traffic signal and touching neighbouring property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Red Lion Street, Holborn, Greater London

item.title: This vehicle has been parked on The,Avenue for several months now., 26th March
item.description:
It is untaxed, has no MOT and is partially blocking the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Springbourne Court, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The corner of 20 Passey Place SE9 5QD, 26th March
item.description:

item.title: Furniture, wood, other rubbish dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16, 26th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London
